x-artifact.note: Design-first artifact only — describes the MCP tool surface, not a running server. Tool input/output schemas $ref the same object schemas as the OpenAPI; each tool maps to an OpenAPI operationId. Surfaces the content BPL already exposes through its accidental public Drupal JSON:API (branches, events, digital collections, electronic resources), fronts the BiblioCommons catalog (search + item detail), and adds place_hold — the net-new write locked today inside the BiblioCommons catalog — plus apply_for_library_card.

server.name: io.nyc.bklynlibrary
server.title: Brooklyn Public Library (BPL)
server.description: Agent-native access to Brooklyn Public Library — branches, events and programs, digital collections, and licensed electronic resources (from BPL's public Drupal JSON:API), plus catalog search and item availability (from the BiblioCommons ILS), and the net-new ability to apply for a library card and place a hold on a book that today live only behind vendor logins.
server.instructions: Use find_branches / get_branch to locate library branches by holds-pickup, region, hours, or free text. find_events searches programs and story times (registration workflow included). search_catalog / get_catalog_item query the BiblioCommons bibliographic catalog and availability. find_digital_collections covers digitized assets, feature collections, and archival finding aids; find_electronic_resources lists licensed databases. get_my_library_card and list_my_holds require an authenticated patron. apply_for_library_card and place_hold (net-new) mutate state — confirm the item, pickup branch, and patron details with the user before submitting. Note: BPL is one of three separate NYC library systems (NYPL, BPL, Queens); this server covers BPL only.

tools.name: find_branches
tools.title: Find Branches
tools.description: Search BPL branches by holds-pickup availability, service region, open-now, and/or free text.

tools.name: get_branch
tools.title: Get Branch
tools.description: Fetch a BPL branch (address, hours, geography, services) by Branch ID.

tools.name: find_events
tools.title: Find Events
tools.description: Search BPL events and programs by branch, program type, audience, virtual flag, or date range.

tools.name: get_event
tools.title: Get Event
tools.description: Fetch a BPL event / program by id, including its registration details.

tools.name: search_catalog
tools.title: Search Catalog
tools.description: Search the BiblioCommons bibliographic catalog by keyword, format, author, or availability — today reachable only through the vendor UI.

tools.name: get_catalog_item
tools.title: Get Catalog Item
tools.description: Fetch a catalog item and its availability across branches by item id.

tools.name: find_digital_collections
tools.title: Find Digital Collections
tools.description: Search BPL digital collections, feature collections, and archival finding aids by kind, creator, or free text.

tools.name: find_electronic_resources
tools.title: Find Electronic Resources
tools.description: List BPL licensed electronic databases / research resources by vendor, language, or free text.

tools.name: get_my_library_card
tools.title: Get My Library Card
tools.description: Return the authenticated patron's own library card — status, expiry, and fines. Today visible only inside the BiblioCommons account.

tools.name: apply_for_library_card
tools.title: Apply for a Library Card
tools.description: Apply for a BPL library card. NET-NEW workflow with no owned public API today — it lives only in a Drupal webform. Mutates state — confirm the applicant details with the user before submitting.

tools.name: list_my_holds
tools.title: List My Holds
tools.description: List the authenticated patron's own holds and their status — today visible only inside the BiblioCommons catalog.

tools.name: place_hold
tools.title: Place a Hold
tools.description: Place a hold / reservation on a BPL catalog item and choose a pickup branch. NET-NEW workflow with no public API today — it lives only in the BiblioCommons catalog behind a login. Requires an authenticated patron. Mutates state — confirm the item and pickup branch first.

tools.name: get_hold
tools.title: Get Hold
tools.description: Fetch a single hold by id, including queue position and pickup status.
